inputs.label: MET Value
inputs.businessContext: Metabolic Equivalent of Task for the activity (e.g., walking = 3.5, jogging = 7, running = 10).

businessContext_i18n.en: Metabolic Equivalent of Task for the activity (e.g., walking = 3.5, jogging = 7, running = 10).

businessContext_i18n.es: Equivalente metabólico de la tarea para la actividad (ej., caminar = 3.5, trotar = 7, correr = 10).

inputs.label: Efficiency Factor
